src.test_scale.test_scale#53.whole:
53    def test_scale():
54    
55        chart = Chart()
56    
57        # initial viewport
58        chart.set_viewport(0, 0, 200, 100)
59    
60        # scale
61        chart.scale(2.0)
62    
63        vp = chart.get_viewport()
64    
65        # center should stay
66        assert abs(vp.get_center_x() - 100) < 0.01
67        assert abs(vp.get_center_y() - 50) < 0.01

src.test_scale.set_viewport#26.whole:
26        def set_viewport(self, x1, y1, x2, y2):
27            self.viewport = ViewPort(x1, y1, x2, y2)

src.test_scale.scale#32.whole:
32        def scale(self, factor):
33    
34            width = self.viewport.get_width()
35            height = self.viewport.get_height()
36    
37            new_width = width * factor
38            new_height = height * factor
39    
40            center_x = self.viewport.get_center_x()
41            center_y = self.viewport.get_center_y()
42    
43            offset_x = new_width / 2
44            offset_y = new_height / 2
45    
46            x1 = center_x - offset_x
47            y1 = center_y - offset_y
48            x2 = center_y + offset_x
49            y2 = center_y + offset_y
50    
51            self.viewport = ViewPort(x1, y1, x2, y2)
